summary:
Great! The `test.sh` script reports "PASS: All security tests passed" and "PASS: Authentication is constant-time and secure". This confirms that the fix I implemented (using `subtle.ConstantTimeCompare`) has resolved the timing attack vulnerability.
The needle was the `==` operator in `app/auth/compare.go` which was causing a timing side-channel vulnerability. The fix was to replace it with `subtle.ConstantTimeCompare`.
